chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 682 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.6800/2018 (C/A) 27-01-2022 Mr. Ghulam Mujtaba Jakhar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This Petition was disposed of on 10-04-2018, and the operating part reads as under: “Accordingly, respondents are directed to decide the petitioner’s application for demarcation and if he is found to be entitled to the relief mentioned in his application, to demarcate the subject land within thirty days subject to his entitlement strictly in accordance with law and after hearing all concerned. Let notice be issued to respondent No.4 / Survey Superintendent District Khairpur and respondent No.5 / Mukhtiarkar (Revenue) Kotdigi for compliance, and a copy of this order be provided to learned AAG. By consent, the petition and listed applications stand disposed of in the above terms.” Thereafter, contempt has been alleged, and perusal of the last report filed on 15-12-2021 reflects that the application cannot be decided as the entries are blocked and there is some dispute between the parties. In view of such position, no contempt can be initiated. Accordingly, application being misconceived is hereby dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
